description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the image registry.gitlab.com/rilis/docker-ci:ci-latest with three stages: test, stats, and docs. Add a clang-format job in the stats stage that runs `find * -iname '*.hpp' -o -iname '*.cpp' | xargs clang-format -i -style=file`, then `git status --porcelain > ../status.log`, `git diff`, and `test ! -s ../status.log`. Add a coverage job in stats that runs `hell --install -r "=" -r "RILI_JSON_TESTS=ON" -r "RILI_JSON_COVERAGE=ON" -i "CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release" -i "CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD=11" -G "Ninja"`, `mkdir build`, `cd build`, `cmake ../ -G"Ninja" -DRILI_JSON_TESTS=ON -DRILI_JSON_COVERAGE=ON -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=../.hell/install -DCMAKE_CXX_STANDARD=11`, `ninja install`, `./rili-json_tests`, `cd ..`, `lcov --directory ./build/ --capture --output-file coverage.info`, `lcov --remove coverage.info '/usr/include/*' '*json/tests/*' '*/.hell/*' -o coverage.info`, `genhtml coverage.info --output-directory coverage`, `lcov --list coverage.info`, and always publishes the coverage directory as an artifact named after the job that expires in one day. Add a cpplint job in stats that runs `find * -iname '*.cpp' -o -iname '*.hpp' | xargs cpplint.py --linelength=120 --extensions=hpp,cpp --filter=-legal/copyright,-build/include_order,-build/c++11,+build/c++14,-runtime/references`. Add a doxygen job in docs that runs `doxygen Doxyfile` and stores `doxygen/html` as a oneâ€‘week artifact. Add a helgrind job in stats that runs `hell --install -r "=" -r "RILI_JSON_TESTS=ON" -i "CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug" -i "CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD=11" -G "Ninja"`, `mkdir build`, `cd build`, `cmake ../ -G"Ninja" -DRILI_JSON_TESTS=ON -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=../.hell/install -DCMAKE_CXX_STANDARD=11`, `ninja install`, and `valgrind --tool=helgrind --error-exitcode=123 --sim-hints=no-nptl-pthread-stackcache ./rili-json_tests`. Add a test job in the test stage that runs `hell --install -r "=" -r "RILI_JSON_TESTS=ON" -i "CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release" -i "CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD=11" -G "Ninja"`, `mkdir build`, `cd build`, `cmake ../ -G"Ninja" -DRILI_JSON_TESTS=ON -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=../.hell/install -DCMAKE_CXX_STANDARD=11`, `ninja install`, `./rili-json_tests`. Finally, add a valgrind job in stats that runs the same Debug build steps and then `valgrind --leak-check=full --show-leak-kinds=all --error-exitcode=123 ./rili-json_tests`.
